verdictSummary: Ledger is internally consistent and publish-safe: zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims, all USCE-flavored signals are either FUTURE_LANE_ONLY or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, and scope conflicts (Delaware-Valley vs. Orlando) are properly flagged. However, Tier 1 USCE coverage for the Orlando campus is FAIL_WEAK — no Orlando-specific USCE page was found; negative evidence is Delaware-scoped. Recommend A4 recovery tasks for Orlando-specific USCE and UCF-Nemours pathway. Multiple A1/A2 duplicates between nemours.org/careers (src_28) and www.nemours.org/careers.html (src_70 — identical hash) should be deduped downstream.
